name: chart-area-04
title: Area Chart - Interactive
description: An interactive stacked area chart over 3 months of daily data, with gradient fills, a legend and a select to switch between 7/30/90-day ranges. Use it as a dashboard's primary time-series panel.

files.content:

ChartArea04() { const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = React.useState("90d") const filteredData = chartData.filter((item) => { const date = new Date(item.date) const referenceDate = new Date("2024-06-30") let daysToSubtract = 90 if (timeRange === "30d") { daysToSubtract = 30 } else if (timeRange === "7d") { daysToSubtract = 7 } const startDate = new Date(referenceDate) startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - daysToSubtract) return date >= startDate }) return (
